## Branch and Commit Policy

- Branch name follows policy (`feature/*`, `release/*`, or `hotfix/*`)
- Commits follow Conventional Commits

## Version and Release Planning

- This PR affects release behavior and SemVer impact is identified:
  - `MAJOR`
  - `MINOR`
  - `PATCH`
  - `N/A`
- If this is release work, target tag is planned (`vX.Y.Z`)
- If this is a hotfix, rollback path is documented

- Planning readiness artifacts remain valid
